name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skyline plugins for Claude Code, including MCP daemon wiring and agent-side enforcement hooks.

plugins.name: skyline-claude
plugins.description: Wires the skyline MCP daemon into Claude Code: HTTP MCP server, PreToolUse enforcement redirecting Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Bash to skyline equivalents, and a daemon watchdog monitor that alerts Claude when the daemon goes down.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Opinionated Claude Code baseline: /core:setup installs the judge-hook rules engine, the writing-guard, the core-hud statusline, and CLAUDE.md guidelines, with a full-bypass permission posture gated by the judge-hook.
